title: TEST-MANIFEST
description: Feature-level test contract. Describes what a feature does as an ordered series of user flows and steps. Generators translate this into Playwright (tests/e2e/<feature>.spec.ts) and Expect (tests/expect/<feature>.expect.ts) test files. The manifest is the source of truth; the generated specs regenerate on every manifest change. Manual edits to generated specs are clobbered -- use escape_hatch to embed verbatim code.

feature.description: Lowercase slug with hyphens. Must match the directory under features/.

version.description: Manifest schema revision for this feature. Bump when you change the flow shape in a way old generated tests can't accommodate.

description.description: Optional human summary of what the feature does.

user_flows.description: Ordered list of named user journeys. Each flow becomes one test() in the generated spec.

name.description: Lowercase slug with hyphens. Used as the test title.

description.description: Optional one-sentence summary of what this flow proves.

preconditions.description: Map of flag name -> boolean. Generators expose these as TODO comments so the author wires up the setup step.

tags.description: Optional free-form tags (e.g. 'happy-path', 'error-state'). Surfaced in test-contracts.yaml.

steps.description: Ordered list of actions the flow performs.

cost_budget.description: Optional per-run cost ceiling the generated test should assert against.

per_run_usd.description: Maximum USD the feature run is allowed to spend in one invocation.

observability.description: Optional observability contract. Generators emit assertions against Langfuse run metadata.

required_run_tags.description: Expressions like "aiCall.label == 'audio-summarize'" that must appear on the Langfuse run for this flow.

step.description: Single action in a flow. Each action has its own required fields; use the oneOf definitions for exact contracts.

text.description: Literal text to type into the input.

description.description: Natural-language description. Used verbatim in the Expect generator.

substring.description: Substring the element's text must contain.

step_expect_text_grows.description: Polling assertion: the locator's textContent length increases monotonically over time. Useful for streaming output.

min_growth_chars.description: Text must grow by at least this many characters across the polling window.

step_feed_audio_fixture.description: Pipe a pre-recorded audio file to the page's MediaStream. Generators scaffold a helper stub with a TODO -- browser mic injection needs per-project wiring.

step_escape_hatch.description: Embed verbatim test code when no structured action fits. Use sparingly -- each escape hatch is counted in the test-contracts registry so drift is visible.

reason.description: Why the structured actions can't express this. Forces the author to justify.

language.description: Which generator should emit this code. The other generator emits a skip comment.

code.description: Verbatim TypeScript. Inserted between the surrounding steps with no escaping.
